_comment_1: FROST example operating-point schema (COMMITTED, documentation only).
_comment_2: The REAL artifact is generated to deploy/referable_dr_demo/.local/operating_point.local.json by analysis/derive_threshold.py and is NEVER committed.
_comment_3: Values below are illustrative placeholders, NOT the deployed threshold. The threshold is derived from the BRSET VALIDATION split only.
backbone_checkpoint_sha256: <sha256 of backbone checkpoint, recorded in .local artifact>
head_checkpoint_sha256: <sha256 of head checkpoint, recorded in .local artifact>
threshold_selection_algorithm: largest threshold T such that validation sensitivity(score>=T) >= 0.95; ties broken toward the largest qualifying score boundary to maximize specificity subject to the sensitivity floor
